name: hc-add-new-booking
description: Creates confirmed bookings for all Independent Living Maintenance Plan services for the week of the requested appointment anchor.

fullName.description: Customer full name. Aliases accepted: name, customerName, full_name, FullName, Name (Genesys script casing).

dob.description: Date of birth dd/mm/yyyy or yyyy-mm-dd

scheduledStart.description: Anchor date and time: dd/mm/yyyy T HH:mm (e.g. 29/04/2026T11:00:00) or ISO 2026-04-29T11:00:00

appointmentDate.description: dd/mm/yyyy or yyyy-mm-dd when scheduledStart is not supplied

appointmentTime.description: HH:mm or HH:mm:ss when scheduledStart is not supplied

storePath.description: Optional override path to bookings JSON for local testing

bookingId.description: Generated primary booking reference (e.g. BK456); same as the first row in bookingIds

primaryBookingReference.description: Alias of bookingId for backwards compatibility
